title: YouTuber Markiplier Embarrasses Hollywood with Debut Film!!
description:
YouTuber Markiplier has embarrassed Hollywood with his debut movie. An adaptation of the video game Iron Lung and with a self financed budget of just $3 million, the film brought in over $21 million in it's opening weekend making it a HUGE financial success.
